title: How Anthropic Engineers ACTUALLY Prompt Claude Code
summary: Austin Marchese presents four rules for effectively prompting Claude Code based on how Anthropic engineers actually use the tool: prompt skills not the model, skills exceed simple prompts, build composable skills, and skills improve across sessions. He argues most users are doing it wrong and these principles apply broadly.
